title: Decorative Buildpack
description: Create-based building modpack with a large variety of blocks and furniture.
body:
I made this modpack to build amazing Create factories with my girlfriend playing in Creative. It has since also been updated and balanced for survival. 
Explore beautiful biomes and YUNG's structures or build the biggest Create contraptions the world has ever seen, all combined with thousands of options for furniture, decoration and food. 
Major mods include Create, Botania, YUNG's mods, Waystones & Xaero's Maps, Macaw's Furniture, Sophisticated Storage and Terratonic. 

This Modpack has Essentials included for easy multiplayer without the need for a server. 

Curseforge Links:
[Building Gadgets](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/building-gadgets)
[Configured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/configured)
